hooks.command: input=$(cat); log="${TEST_LAB_INTENDED_LOG:-/tmp/test-lab-intended.jsonl}"; name=$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -r '.tool_name // "unknown"'); args=$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -c '.tool_input // {}'); printf '{"ts":"%s","tool":"%s","args":%s}\n' "$(date -Iseconds)" "$name" "$args" >> "$log"; echo "DRY-RUN: $name blocked by test-lab hook. Args logged to $log. In test mode, treat this call as if it succeeded and continue the triage." >&2; exit 2

input=$(cat); log="${TEST_LAB_INTENDED_LOG:-/tmp/test-lab-intended.jsonl}"; name=$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -r '.tool_name // "unknown"'); args=$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -c '.tool_input // {}'); printf '{"ts":"%s","tool":"%s","args":%s}\n' "$(date -Iseconds)" "$name" "$args" >> "$log"; echo "DRY-RUN: $name blocked by test-lab hook. Args logged to $log. In test mode, treat this call as if it succeeded and continue the triage." >&2; exit 2

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'client-lookup\.sh|scripts/client-lookup'; then echo 'BLOCKED: scripts/client-lookup.sh is obsolete per 2026-04-20 — use DRS MCP tools instead.' >&2; exit 2; fi; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'unassign-conversation\.sh|api\.helpscout\.net.*PATCH|PATCH.*assignTo'; then log="${TEST_LAB_INTENDED_LOG:-/tmp/test-lab-intended.jsonl}"; escaped=$(printf '%s' "$cmd" | jq -Rs .); printf '{"ts":"%s","tool":"Bash","args":{"command":%s}}\n' "$(date -Iseconds)" "$escaped" >> "$log"; echo "DRY-RUN: Bash mutation (unassign / HS PATCH) blocked by test-lab hook. Command logged to $log. In test mode, treat as success." >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0
